caption: I'm a Philly fan stuck in Baltimore, which is like being a crab cake at a cheesesteak festival - I just don't belong. Every time I wear my Eagles jersey to a Ravens game, I get weird looks, but honestly, it's worth it to see the horror on a Natty Boh-swilling Baltimorian's face. My friends back in Philly think I'm crazy for living here, but someone's gotta represent the Birds in Crab Country.
fullPost:
I'm a Philly fan stuck in Baltimore, which is like being a crab cake at a cheesesteak festival - I just don't belong. Every time I wear my Eagles jersey to a Ravens game, I get weird looks, but honestly, it's worth it to see the horror on a Natty Boh-swilling Baltimorian's face. My friends back in Philly think I'm crazy for living here, but someone's gotta represent the Birds in Crab Country.
